scripts.db:migrate: pnpm db:migrate:contacts && pnpm db:migrate:mock && pnpm db:migrate:areas && pnpm db:migrate:call-logs && pnpm db:migrate:reporters && pnpm db:migrate:category-master && pnpm db:migrate:location-codes && pnpm db:migrate:audit-logs && pnpm db:migrate:contact-coverage && pnpm db:migrate:db-readiness && pnpm db:migrate:target-schema && pnpm db:migrate:target-backfill && pnpm db:migrate:drop-mock-tables && pnpm db:migrate:incident-tracking && pnpm db:migrate:share-channels && pnpm db:migrate:system-settings
scripts.db:migrate:contacts: docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/002_contacts_mock_fields.sql
scripts.db:migrate:mock: docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/003_mock_reference_data.sql
scripts.db:migrate:areas: docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/004_area_boundary_metadata.sql
scripts.db:migrate:call-logs: docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/005_drop_incident_duration.sql
scripts.db:migrate:reporters: docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/006_reporter_session_history.sql
scripts.db:migrate:category-master: docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/007_category_master_fields.sql
scripts.db:migrate:location-codes: docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/008_location_codes.sql
scripts.db:migrate:audit-logs: docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/009_audit_logs.sql
scripts.db:migrate:contact-coverage: docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/010_contact_coverage_type.sql
scripts.db:migrate:db-readiness: docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/011_database_readiness.sql
scripts.db:migrate:target-schema: docker compose exec -T db psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/013_phase1_target_schema.sql
scripts.db:migrate:target-backfill: docker compose exec -T db psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/014_phase2_backfill_target_schema.sql
scripts.db:migrate:drop-mock-tables: docker compose exec -T db psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/015_drop_mock_tables.sql
scripts.db:migrate:incident-tracking: docker compose exec -T db psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/016_incident_tracking.sql
scripts.db:migrate:share-channels: docker compose exec -T db psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/017_center_share_channels.sql
scripts.db:migrate:system-settings: docker compose exec -T db psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/018_system_settings.sql
scripts.db:seed: docker compose cp services/emergency-api/db/seeds/dev_seed.sql db:/tmp/dev_seed.sql && docker compose exec -T db psql -U emergency -d smart_emergency -f /tmp/dev_seed.sql
